pages.title: Astra Coins
pages.text: $(bold)Astra Coins$() are the pack's secondary currency. They're earned by completing quests across all five chapters.$(br2)Coins are not farmable — each quest awards them once. This means your total coin supply is finite, so be selective about what you spend them on.

pages.title: Earning Coins
pages.text: $(bold)Phase I — 20 coins$() available$(br)$(bold)Phase II — 24 coins$() available$(br)$(bold)Phase III — 22 coins$() available$(br)$(bold)Phase IV — 20 coins$() available$(br)$(bold)Phase V — 71 coins$() available$(br)$(bold)Prestige — 375 coins$() available$(br2)By end of Phase V you'll have around 157 total coins. Most of the economy lives in the Prestige chapter.

pages.title: Spending Priority
pages.text: Early-game (5–30 coins): food, bone meal, blaze rods, ender pearls.$(br2)Mid-game (25–65 coins): iron ingots, diamonds, IE steel, obsidian, XP.$(br2)Late-game (80–300 coins): Ancient Debris, Totem, Astra Field Blade, full Armor Set, Nether Star, Elytra.$(br2)The Elytra costs 300 coins — a true prestige purchase.
